languages.text: Это кресло с роскошной обивкой из натурального бархата явно создано руками чрезвычайно искусного мастера. При первом же взгляде на него становится очевидным, что оно стоит целое состояние.

traits.locale_text: Это кресло с роскошной обивкой из натурального бархата явно создано руками чрезвычайно искусного мастера. При первом же взгляде на него становится очевидным, что оно стоит целое состояние.

languages.text: This chair, luxuriously upholstered in natural velvet, is clearly the work of a highly skilled craftsman. It is obvious at a glance that it is worth a fortune.
languages.original_text: Это кресло с роскошной обивкой из натурального бархата явно создано руками чрезвычайно искусного мастера. При первом же взгляде на него становится очевидным, что оно стоит целое состояние.

traits.locale_text: This chair, luxuriously upholstered in natural velvet, is clearly the work of a highly skilled craftsman. It is obvious at a glance that it is worth a fortune.
This chair, luxuriously upholstered in natural velvet, is clearly the work of a highly skilled craftsman. It is obvious at a glance that it is worth a fortune.
This chair, luxuriously upholstered in natural velvet, is clearly the work of a highly skilled craftsman. It is obvious at a glance that it is worth a fortune.

languages.text: この椅子は、天然のベルベットで贅沢に張られた、明らかに熟練の職人の作品である。ひと目見て、その価値は莫大であることがわかる。
languages.original_text: This chair, luxuriously upholstered in natural velvet, is clearly the work of a highly skilled craftsman. It is obvious at a glance that it is worth a fortune.

languages.text: Doğal kadife ile lüks bir şekilde döşenmiş bu sandalyenin çok yetenekli bir zanaatkârın eseri olduğu çok açık. Bir servet değerinde olduğu, bir bakışta anlaşılıyor.
languages.original_text: This chair, luxuriously upholstered in natural velvet, is clearly the work of a highly skilled craftsman. It is obvious at a glance that it is worth a fortune.

traits.locale_text: Doğal kadife ile lüks bir şekilde döşenmiş bu sandalyenin çok yetenekli bir zanaatkârın eseri olduğu çok açık. Bir servet değerinde olduğu, bir bakışta anlaşılıyor.

languages.text: 这张以天鹅绒华丽包覆的座椅无疑是顶级工匠的杰作，一眼便知其价值不菲。
languages.original_text: This chair, luxuriously upholstered in natural velvet, is clearly the work of a highly skilled craftsman. It is obvious at a glance that it is worth a fortune.

traits.locale_text: 这张以天鹅绒华丽包覆的座椅无疑是顶级工匠的杰作，一眼便知其价值不菲。

languages.text: Dieser mit natürlichem Samt überzogene Stuhl ist eindeutig das Werk eines geschickten Handwerkers. Man erkennt auf den ersten Blick, dass er ein Vermögen wert ist.
languages.original_text: This chair, luxuriously upholstered in natural velvet, is clearly the work of a highly skilled craftsman. It is obvious at a glance that it is worth a fortune.

traits.locale_text: Dieser mit natürlichem Samt überzogene Stuhl ist eindeutig das Werk eines geschickten Handwerkers. Man erkennt auf den ersten Blick, dass er ein Vermögen wert ist.

languages.text: Ce fauteuil luxueux, recouvert d'un velours naturel, est visiblement l'œuvre d'un artisan de talent. Un coup d'œil suffit à comprendre qu'il vaut une fortune.
languages.original_text: This chair, luxuriously upholstered in natural velvet, is clearly the work of a highly skilled craftsman. It is obvious at a glance that it is worth a fortune.

traits.locale_text: Ce fauteuil luxueux, recouvert d'un velours naturel, est visiblement l'œuvre d'un artisan de talent. Un coup d'œil suffit à comprendre qu'il vaut une fortune.

languages.text: Esta silla, tapizada con terciopelo natural, es obra de un auténtico maestro. Su elevado valor es evidente.
